notableEvents.label: Sal Stewart reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Ryan Kreidler. Elly De La Cruz to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Steer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Steer grounds into a double play, pitcher Justin Topa to second baseman Luke Keaschall to first baseman Josh Bell. Eugenio Suárez out at 2nd. Spencer Steer out at 1st.
